title: The Monster Spawned Official Pack [Modded Edition]
description: The official Monster Spawned modpack for the modded side of things...
body:
# Monster Spawned [Modded Edition]

## What is this

This modpack is designed for both the veteran Minecraft and beginner Minecraft player alike... While there will likely be a learning curve for the new player, it will be both rewarding and enjoyable along the way. It is designed with 1.20.1 in mind, and will likely have many updates in the future as content becomes available for more recent versions of Minecraft.

The idea was to have a mix of some nostalgic mods, like The Aether Rewrite (a mod with what many consider a "hostile paradise"), mixed with the technology of the mods like The Create mod. Currently only The Aether has been implemented due to compatibility reasons, but The Create mod will be implemented as soon as possible. Other mods are listed in the section below, which will be updated as often as possible.

## Mod list

The Monster Spawned [Modded Edition] pack makes use of mods, the most up-to-date version can be found [here](modrinth.com/modpack/ms-modded/version/latest) under the "Dependencies" list.

## Plans/To-Do:

* Determine a minimum amount of RAM required for the modpack.

* Make the modpack more efficient.

* Add some more fun things, as mods become updated and available for 1.20.1/2 (and add other mods that fit the description and goal of this pack).

* Potentially update the pack to 1.20.4 and further.

## What is the theme?

The general theme of this pack is: casual adventure. Too often in today's world are we caught up in competitive gameplay. This is the reason why this pack ([and my other, more vanilla-compatible and centered pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ms-vanilla)) were born: to just have fun in a world where competition seems to be the main point of the game.

Gone are the days where people could sit down and have a split-screen co-op session, playing their favorite game(s), whilst chatting over the table and entertainment provided by the game they mutually enjoyed. In fact, fewer and fewer games are becoming split-screen by the year.

This pack is simply meant to try to fill a portion of that gap, void, and hole in so many gamer's lives. It is meant to be fun, mildly challenging, and still enjoyable without being competitive. 

## Contact

If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me via email here: [link](mailto:site-admin@themoddersden.com). I am also on Discord at: `TheModdersDen`, [X/Twitter](https://twitter.com/TheModdersDen), and [Reddit](https://reddit.com/u/TheModdersDen). Please mention the pack when reaching out to me via these platforms and I will do my best to respond in a reasonable time. :)
